events.event_description: Edward L. Romero presented credentials as the first U.S. Ambassador to Andorra, establishing nonresident ambassadorial relations. Romero was resident in Madrid, not Andorra.

evidence.quote: Edward L Romero, Ambassador Extraordinary and Plenipotentiary. Appointed: 1998-06-29. Credentials presented: 1998-10-30. Left Madrid on 2001-06-01.
